justifications.mt_misunderstanding: 'the House' is interpreted as multiple assemblies, leading it to use the plural form 'les Assemblées'
justifications.author_intent: To refer to a single  legislative body
justifications.reader_impact: That there are several legislative bodies and all need to agree

justifications.mt_misunderstanding: 'do as Mr Evans has suggested' is interpreted as a more explicit 'follow Mr Evans's recommendation,'
justifications.author_intent: the speaker will do as Mr Evans suggested, without specifying the nature of the suggestion
justifications.reader_impact: There was a particular recommendation of Mr Evans

justifications.mt_misunderstanding: The MT system interpreted 'agrees' as requiring a direct prepositional object, translating it literally as 'sont d'accord avec,' mirroring the English structure 'agree with.'
justifications.author_intent: to state a condition that the member of the House agree
justifications.reader_impact: a condition that the member of the House agree
